blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 56 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
